content.json:
# BusTerminal — Discovery telemetry

Dashboard for the Spec 009 discovery worker. All metrics sourced from `BusTerminal.Discovery` ActivitySource + Meter (see R-12).

**Time range** is controlled by the workbook-level picker. **Namespace** can be filtered via the parameter below to scope every panel.

parameters.name: NamespaceId
parameters.description: Filter every panel to a single namespace. Leave blank to see all.

content.json:
## Runs / day

Total discovery runs grouped by status.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "discovery.run.completed"
| where isempty('{NamespaceId}') or tostring(customDimensions.namespace_id) == '{NamespaceId}'
| extend status = tostring(customDimensions.status)
| summarize Runs = count() by bin(timestamp, 1d), status
| render columnchart

content.json:
## Success rate

Succeeded ÷ (Succeeded + Failed). Excludes still-running.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "discovery.run.completed"
| where isempty('{NamespaceId}') or tostring(customDimensions.namespace_id) == '{NamespaceId}'
| extend status = tostring(customDimensions.status)
| summarize Total = count(), Succeeded = countif(status == "Succeeded") by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| extend SuccessRate = todouble(Succeeded) / todouble(Total)
| project timestamp, SuccessRate
| render timechart

content.json:
## Duration P50 / P95

Discovery run duration percentiles in seconds.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == "discovery.run.duration"
| where isempty('{NamespaceId}') or tostring(customDimensions.namespace_id) == '{NamespaceId}'
| summarize P50 = percentile(value, 50), P95 = percentile(value, 95), P99 = percentile(value, 99) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart

content.json:
## Retry counts

Retries emitted by the worker's ARM client. Surface unusual spikes — usually throttling.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == "discovery.arm.retries"
| where isempty('{NamespaceId}') or tostring(customDimensions.namespace_id) == '{NamespaceId}'
| summarize Retries = sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 1h), tostring(customDimensions.phase)
| render columnchart

content.json:
## Failure category breakdown

Failed runs broken down by `DiscoveryFailureCategory` (Authn | Authz | NotFound | Throttled | Transport | Internal | WorkerLost | Unknown).

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "discovery.run.completed"
| where isempty('{NamespaceId}') or tostring(customDimensions.namespace_id) == '{NamespaceId}'
| where tostring(customDimensions.status) == "Failed"
| summarize Count = count() by tostring(customDimensions.failure_category)
| render piechart
